prediction.reasoning: NextEra Energy (NEE) is a large-cap utility stock with relatively low volatility. Based on historical price movements, utilities typically have daily volatility around 1-2%. Over 7 days, this translates to potential moves of 3-7% in either direction. The point estimate assumes slight upward bias due to dividend yield attraction and defensive nature of utilities in current market conditions. Confidence intervals account for typical utility stock volatility with wider ranges for higher confidence levels.
